api.name: quest_command
api.description: Execute a pulse quest management command. Routes to the n8n W2 webhook handler for all quest operations.

action.description: The command to execute: today, complete, cancel, defer, restore, edit, add, regen, brief, stats, deferred, preview, weekly, help

target.description: Optional target: quest number(s) for interactive commands (e.g., '1,3' or '1-3'), 'all' for /brief all, issue IDs for resolved selections

params.description: Optional parameters: { days: number } for /stats, { name: string, duration: string } for /add, { field: string, value: string } for /edit

meta.title: pulse Quest Manager
meta.description: Daily quest management system powered by Plane.so and n8n
